title: Fluffy Warm Spanish Rigatoni Noodle Board
description: A comforting vegan-friendly dish featuring roasted rigatoni noodles in a wok-hei infused wooden board.
instructions: Chop aubergine into thin slices and green onions finely.
Drizzle olive oil over aubergine slices, sprinkle with chili flakes, balsamic vinegar, and toss lightly.
Spread aubergine slices on a baking tray lined with parchment paper. Roast for 15 minutes.
In a wok, sauté tomato paste with green onions until fragrant.
Add roasted aubergine to the wok mixture and mix well.
Cook rigatoni pasta in boiling salted water according to package instructions.
Drain pasta and add it directly into the wok mixture. Mix thoroughly until everything is coated evenly.
Transfer the warm rigatoni noodles into a wooden board for serving.
